flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at CUNY Queens College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (14.9k → 12.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY Queens College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at CUNY Queens College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (27.9% → 32.6%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at CUNY Queens College fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $10.3k).
